reference: Do serum Thyroid-Stimulating Hormone and serum Prolactin, then do Hysterosalpingography on day eight. Then, perform a follicular study after taking Clomiphene from day two and Gonadotropins until the follicle size increases to eighteen millimeters. Then, rupturing and Intrauterine Insemination for early results.
text: Do serum thyroid-stimulating hormone and serum prolactin, then do hysterosalpingography on day eight. Then perform a follicular study after taking clomiphene from day two and gonadotropins until the follicle size increases to 18 millimeters, then rupturing an intrauterine insemination for early results.
